name: Blood Moon Prophet, the Crimson Oracle
lore_text:
Blood Moon Prophet, the Crimson Oracle — Kingdom-Bosses of Stone/Veil Duality.
A super presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Stone/Veil sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Standard Initiative (5)
🛡️ Guard 5 • ⚔️ First Strike 4
Reduces first incoming hit by 40%; Shrouded on entry; adjacent enemies −1 accuracy; End step: pay 1 supply or take 2 recoil.
• Count resources; burst then rotate.
• Pair with allies that cover your weakest stat.
• Trade only when your initiative window is open.

name: Anu the Exarch of Heaven
lore_text:
Anu the Exarch of Heaven — Bosses of Oath/Stone Duality.
A ultra presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Oath/Stone sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Transcendent Initiative (13)
🛡️ Guard 7 • ⚔️ First Strike 7
Acts before all; drains 10% HP from enemies each turn; ignores sub‑divine damage reduction.
• Leverage inevitability: long fights favor you via drains.
• Focus-break enemy synergies before they can respond.
• Protect your leader; trade only when tempo remains yours.
